Highly recommend Tri-County Brick.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Reid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4XqKDculVLj1QfIPp7qjqW9f4S8rgsO9ovZemYFb_VnaImg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Had repair work done to a fireplace which we purchased from Tri-county several years ago.  Have generally been happy with the work and people I've dealt with but I am upset about their billing.  $149 minimum per hour.  First visit was maybe 30 minutes, which included a cleaning and diagnosis of a bad controller.  The controller had to be ordered in.  The tech added that note to the invoice but no one did anything about it.  I had to called back and get it ordered.   When it came in, it took them maybe 10 minutes max to replace it.  Once again, $149 for 10 minutes of work.  If the part had been in stock, they could have easily done both of these services in less than an hour.  In the end, they gouged me for an extra $150.  I'm sure it was worth it as I won't be doing any more business with them or recommending them to anyone.  So, if you like getting gouged, give them a call.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura Nelson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIAAhS3if_bVA7HCTOYhDDwBKGdXWGb4VlZTvFfCI1aOgI7Ers=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing customer service! Her tip worked!!
